twitter_thread: Generated $12k in passive income last year from 2 dividend ETFs: VIG and DVY. $100/month got me started.
Vanguard Dividend Appreciation Index Fund (VIG) yields 2.1%, fees are 0.06%. A solid choice.
High-turnover ETFs like FTRI can cost you 1.5% in fees. Look for turnover rates under 20%.
Tax-loss harvesting saved me $2,500 last year. Consider it if you have capital gains from other investments.
I invested $100/month in dividend ETFs for 5 years. Now I earn $600/month in passive income.
Diversify across 2-3 ETFs: VIG, DVY, and SPHD. This mix has given me steady 4% returns.
What's your go-to dividend ETF for passive income? #passiveincome #investing
